overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through Night City at night. The journey transitions from a covered walkway under an elevated highway, through an open corporate plaza with neon signage, and onto a busy main street lined with towering skyscrapers and massive digital billboards. Wet pavement reflects the vibrant neon lights, creating a characteristic cyberpunk atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under elevated highway

events.description: futuristic silver SUV passes by on the right side of the walkway
approaching exit from covered walkway into open plaza area ahead

agents.ego_description: character walking steadily under the overpass with arms swinging naturally

notable_agents.action: futuristic SUV driving past the character on the right side, heading away from camera

entered.detail: massive concrete overpass spanning overhead with visible support beams
large cylindrical pillars supporting the elevated highway above
illuminated traffic sign displaying speed limit 40 mounted on pole

segments.scene_description: The character walks beneath a massive elevated highway structure supported by large concrete pillars. The area is dimly lit with artificial lighting reflecting off the wet concrete sidewalk. A futuristic SUV passes by on the right, and the character approaches an opening leading to a brighter plaza area ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: corporate plaza with landscaping and seating

events.description: exits covered walkway into open plaza with palm trees and concrete benches
ambient light increases as character moves away from overpass shadow into open area

agents.ego_description: character walking through the plaza passing by landscaped planters and benches

entered.detail: large illuminated corporate signage reading NIGHT CITY in cyan and red neon on glass building facade
tropical palm trees planted in large rectangular concrete planters
modern white concrete benches arranged along the walkway for seating
tall modern skyscraper with illuminated windows and reflective glass surface

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from under the overpass into an open corporate plaza featuring palm trees in concrete planters and modern benches. The NIGHT CITY neon sign glows prominently on a glass building ahead. The lighting shifts from artificial to mixed as the character moves through this landscaped transitional space.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway between concrete wall and glass building

events.description: re-enters covered walkway with concrete barrier wall on left and glass facade on right
distant neon lights from main street become visible ahead, increasing illumination

agents.ego_description: character walking along the covered path with reflective glass walls on the right side

entered.detail: tall smooth concrete wall running along the left side of the walkway
modern glass curtain wall reflecting colorful neon lights from the street

segments.scene_description: The character transitions back into a covered walkway bordered by a stark concrete wall on the left and a reflective glass building facade on the right. The environment is dimly lit with artificial light, and the distant glow of neon signs from the main street becomes increasingly visible as the character approaches the exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy downtown street with digital advertising and traffic

events.description: emerges onto main street with heavy traffic and massive digital billboards on skyscrapers
multiple vehicles create light trails as they drive past on the wet multi-lane street

agents.ego_description: character walking along the sidewalk next to busy traffic, passing under large digital displays

notable_agents.action: stream of cars and taxis driving along the multi-lane street with headlights reflecting on wet pavement

entered.detail: massive illuminated advertising screens covering the facade of a dark skyscraper, displaying colorful cyberpunk advertisements
tall building with distinctive vertical red neon strip lighting running up its height
red and white striped concrete barriers separating the sidewalk from the vehicle lanes
elevated highway overpass visible ahead spanning across the main street

segments.scene_description: The character emerges onto a bustling main street dominated by towering skyscrapers covered in massive digital billboards. The wet asphalt reflects the vibrant neon lights from the advertisements and vehicle headlights. The character walks along the sidewalk separated from the moderate traffic by striped barriers, passing under an elevated highway structure while surrounded by the iconic cyberpunk cityscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the dim underbelly of an elevated highway into the vibrant, neon-drenched heart of a futuristic metropolis. It begins beneath a massive concrete overpass where artificial light glints off wet sidewalks as a futuristic SUV passes by. As the character moves forward, the scene opens into a landscaped corporate plaza featuring palm trees and a glowing Night City sign before shifting back into a narrow, dimly lit walkway bordered by a reflective glass facade. The environment finally expands onto a bustling main street, where the lighting transforms into a kaleidoscope of vibrant neon from towering digital billboards reflecting off the wet asphalt.
